title: Smatterers
content:
All smatterers are more brisk and pert
    Than those that understand an art;
    As little sparkles shine more bright
    Than glowing coals, that give them light.
meaning:
Samuel Butler's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Smatterers"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
